public_notes: BRender is the first production-readiness pilot. A public source checkout matched the recorded v1.3.2 snapshot commit, exposed period make/project metadata, and now has a materializer plus successful out-of-tree CMake configure and core-library build for the FLOAT path. The produced brender_core_float.lib remains outside this metadata repo. Runtime execution, warning cleanup, packaging, drivers, and FIXED variants are not claimed yet.
